title: deer-flow.audit.recommendation v1
description: Auditor's verdict and remediation recommendations for a stack-tuner cycle. Two intentional shapes are emitted: the compact form (source=/deer-flow) carries only cycle_id + action + pathology for cross-cycle aggregation; the full form (source=/deer-flow/stack-tuner) carries the rich audit detail. Either is valid — consumers should branch on presence of `summary` to detect the rich form.

cycle_id.description: stack-tuner cycle this audit belongs to (matches subject)

audit_id.description: unique id for this audit run; usually <cycle_id>-audit or <ts>-auditor (optional — omitted by some early-stage publishers)

recommended_action.description: rich-form action token (e.g. flag_for_human, auto_fix, adjust_soul, retry, rerun_with_tweak, ignore)

action.description: compact-form action — same semantic role as recommended_action, used by /deer-flow source

pathology.description: compact-form pathology tag identifying the failure pattern (e.g. trivial_task_economy_conflict)

summary.description: 1-2 sentence narrative — present in rich form only

auto_fix_command.description: shell command to execute when recommended_action=auto_fix

linguistic_lowest.description: weakest linguistic dimension flagged by the auditor
